news.title: Snap Inc. plans to launch 'Specs', lightweight immersive smart glasses in 2026
news.summary: Snap Inc. is set to enter the smart glasses market in 2026 with 'Specs', featuring see-through lenses that augment reality and integrate digital and physical experiences.
news.content: Snap Inc. is preparing to launch 'Specs', a new lightweight and immersive smart glasses product in 2026. These smart glasses, which will integrate digital and physical experiences, are designed to have see-through lenses that augment reality. The company is also enhancing its AR tools and is collaborating with Niantic to introduce advanced features. Updates to Snap OS will reportedly support AI-powered developments.

news.title: Apple's AI-Powered Smart Glasses to Arrive in 2026
news.summary: Apple is reportedly planning to launch smart glasses by the end of 2026, featuring AI capabilities and a multimodal interaction system.
news.content: According to a Bloomberg report, Apple is working on a pair of smart glasses that will be released by the end of 2026. These glasses are expected to include cameras, microphones, and speakers, along with AI capabilities that will allow the glasses to analyze the wearer's environment. The device is also expected to have Siri integration, enabling users to control music playback, answer phone calls, and give directions, among other features.

news.title: Sarvam AI launches first AI-powered smart glasses 'Kaze' in India
news.summary: Indian AI startup Sarvam AI has unveiled its first AI-powered smart glasses 'Sarvam Kaze' at the India AI Impact Summit 2026.
news.content: Sarvam AI, an Indian AI startup, introduced its first AI-powered smart glasses named 'Sarvam Kaze' at the India AI Impact Summit 2026. These glasses represent a shift from screen-based AI interaction to a wearable format, featuring audiovisual capture and voice-activated AI. They are set to be available in May 2026 and notably, Prime Minister Narendra Modi was the first person to try them.

news.title: Apple's New AI-Powered Smart Glasses Expected to Compete with Meta's Ray-Ban Meta
news.summary: Apple is reportedly developing smart glasses with AI capabilities, expected to compete with Meta's Ray-Ban Meta glasses in the market.
news.content: Apple is said to be developing a pair of smart glasses that will be released by the end of 2026. These glasses are expected to have AI capabilities and will be able to analyze the wearer's environment, much like Meta's Ray-Ban Meta glasses. The device is also expected to have Siri integration, enabling hands-free control of various functions. Apple's entry into the smart glasses market is seen as a significant move to compete with Meta, which has already found success with its Ray-Ban Meta product.

news.title: Lenskart to Launch AI-Powered Smart Glasses 'B' with UPI and Camera Functions
news.summary: Lenskart plans to launch AI-powered smart glasses branded 'B' by March 2026, featuring UPI payments, health monitoring, and real-time scanning.
news.content: Lenskart is gearing up to launch its AI-powered smart glasses, named 'B', by March 2026. These glasses are being developed in-house on Qualcomm's AR1 chip and will include features such as UPI payments, health monitoring, and real-time scanning. Lenskart is also encouraging developers to create applications for the platform, indicating a push towards a broader ecosystem for the device.

news.title: Huawei's Latest Smart Watch Features Advanced Health Monitoring
news.summary: Huawei has announced a new smart watch with advanced health monitoring capabilities, including continuous heart rate tracking and sleep analysis.
news.content: Huawei has unveiled its latest smart watch that comes equipped with advanced health monitoring features. The new watch offers continuous heart rate tracking, sleep analysis, and other health metrics, positioning it as a significant player in the health-tech wearables market. This move by Huawei is in line with the growing trend of integrating more comprehensive health tracking into smart wearables.

news.title: Apple's Upcoming Smart Glasses to Feature Siri Integration
news.summary: Apple is developing smart glasses expected to be released in 2026, with Siri integration being a key feature of the device.
news.content: Apple's smart glasses, which are anticipated to be launched by the end of 2026, will reportedly include Siri integration, allowing for hands-free operation and voice command capabilities. This move is seen as part of Apple's broader strategy to enhance its AI capabilities and compete in the growing smart glasses market.

news.title: Google Collaborates with Samsung for AI Smart Glasses Development
news.summary: Google has announced a partnership with Samsung to develop AI smart glasses compatible with Android XR, scheduled for release in 2026.
news.content: Google has revealed that it is working with Samsung and other partners to develop AI smart glasses that will be compatible with Android XR, the operating system for cross-reality devices. The first AI smart glasses from Google are expected to be released in 2026. These glasses will come in two varieties: one with a speaker, microphone, and camera that functions as an AI assistant, and another with an in-lens display that can privately display directions, translated subtitles, and more.

news.title: Zephyr RTOS Reaches Major Milestone with New Release
news.summary: The Zephyr Project has announced a new release of its RTOS, focusing on improving security and introducing new features for IoT devices.
news.content: The Zephyr Project, a leading real-time operating system (RTOS) for the Internet of Things (IoT), has announced a new release that includes significant improvements in security and new features aimed at enhancing the capabilities of IoT devices. This update underscores the project's commitment to providing a secure and reliable OS for the rapidly evolving IoT landscape.

news.title: 涂鸦智能 Announces New API Updates for AI Ecosystem Expansion
news.summary: Tuya Smart, a leading AI+IoT platform, has announced new API updates aimed at expanding its AI ecosystem and enhancing device integration.
news.content: Tuya Smart, known for its AI+IoT platform, has announced new API updates that will facilitate greater integration and interaction within its AI ecosystem. These updates are designed to make it easier for developers to create and deploy smart devices that can interact seamlessly within the Tuya ecosystem, further solidifying its position as a key player in the smart home market.

news.title: Qualcomm Launches New Snapdragon X2 Plus Chipset for AI PCs
news.summary: Qualcomm has announced a new Snapdragon X2 Plus chipset at CES, promising enhanced performance and energy efficiency for AI PCs.
news.content: At CES 2026, Qualcomm unveiled its new Snapdragon X2 Plus chipset, which is expected to bring improved performance and energy efficiency to midrange laptops. The chipset features a 10-core Oryon CPU, an updated Adreno GPU, and LPDDR5x memory. It also includes Wi-Fi 7 support, Qualcomm's Snapdragon Guardian security technology, and other features that position it as a strong contender in the AI PC market.

news.title: Rokid Introduces New Smart Glasses with Advanced AI Capabilities
news.summary: Rokid, a leading AR glass manufacturer, has introduced a new model of smart glasses with advanced AI capabilities, enhancing user interaction.
news.content: Rokid, known for its augmented reality glasses, has launched a new model that boasts advanced AI capabilities. These smart glasses are designed to provide an enhanced user interaction experience, with features such as real-time translation, navigation, and other AI-driven functionalities. This move by Rokid underscores the company's commitment to pushing the boundaries of what's possible with AI in wearable technology.

news.title: NXP Introduces New i.MX 9 Series for AI-Enabled Devices
news.summary: NXP has introduced the new i.MX 9 series of processors, designed to power AI-enabled devices with advanced performance and efficiency.
news.content: NXP Semiconductors has launched the i.MX 9 series, a new line of processors that are specifically designed to meet the demands of AI-enabled devices. The i.MX 9 series offers a combination of high performance and power efficiency, making it an attractive option for manufacturers looking to develop the next generation of smart devices.

news.title: Linux Foundation Releases Updated Training for RTOS
news.summary: The Linux Foundation has released an updated training program for RTOS, aimed at educating developers on the latest practices and tools.
news.content: The Linux Foundation has announced an updated training program focused on real-time operating systems (RTOS). This comprehensive course covers the latest tools, techniques, and best practices for developing with RTOS, ensuring that developers are well-equipped to handle the challenges of creating software for embedded systems.

news.title: Apple Files New Patents暗示未来 AR/VR 设备中眼动追踪技术的应用
news.summary: 苹果公司最近提交的新专利文件暗示了未来在AR/VR设备中应用眼动追踪技术的可能性，这可能与其智能眼镜产品的发展相关。
news.content: 苹果公司最近提交的专利文件显示，公司正在研究眼动追踪技术，这项技术未来可能被应用在苹果的AR/VR设备中，包括其正在开发的智能眼镜。这项技术能够提高用户交互的自然性和直观性，为苹果在竞争激烈的智能眼镜市场中提供差异化的优势。
